story-0023-0001.summary: Created data-modeling knowledge pack with SKILL.md and 3 reference files. Modified KnowledgePackSelection. 21 new tests passing.

story-0023-0013.summary: Integration verification: 4945 tests pass, 95.84% line coverage, 90.78% branch coverage. 4 new golden profiles created. 17 DBs validated. Backward compatibility confirmed.
